annotations.request_text: Draw a red rectangle around the ArraySubs admin menu section on the left and label it "ArraySubs navigation".
annotations.target_description: ArraySubs menu item and its expanded submenu in the left WordPress admin sidebar

annotations.request_text: Draw a red rectangle around the subscription status filter tabs near the top of the table and label it "Status filters".
annotations.target_description: Status filter links above the subscriptions table, from All through Trial

annotations.request_text: Draw a red rectangle around the search field and gateway dropdown and label it "Find subscriptions".
annotations.target_description: Customer search input and All Gateways dropdown in the table controls

annotations.request_text: Draw a red rectangle around the Add New Subscription and Export CSV buttons and label it "Create or export".
annotations.target_description: Add New Subscription and Export CSV buttons above the subscriptions table

annotations.request_text: Draw a red rectangle around the View Details and Edit row actions in the first visible subscription row and label it "Row actions".
annotations.target_description: View Details and Edit row action links beneath the first visible subscription row status area
